わふ～♪ 戻って来たな～。 <br>散歩、とっても楽しかったぞ～、司令官！: Woof!♪ We're back. The walk was super fun, Commander!
ああ、俺も楽しめたぞ。 <br>なかなか刺激的な散歩だった。: Yeah, I had fun too. That was quite a stimulating walk.
着ぐるみを着たホノカが通りに姿を見せると、<br>その可愛らしい姿に、再び買い物:
When Honoka appeared on the street in her dog costume, the
shoppers gathered around again, drawn by her adorable appearance.
なんだなんだ、仮装か？: What's this, what's this? A costume?
先ほどと同じように、集まった人々がホノカを撫でる。<br>彼女はご機嫌に受け入れ:
Just as before, the gathered people began to pet Honoka. She happily
accepted their attention.
ホノカが微かに声を漏らし、頬を赤く染める。<br>それに気づいたのか、撫でていた:
Honoka let out the faintest sound, her cheeks flushing. The child who
had been petting her tilted their head, puzzled.
どうしたのホノカお姉ちゃん？<br>もしかして痛かった？: What's wrong, Big Sis Honoka? Are you hurt?
なんでもないぞ♪ 全然平気だ～♪: It's nothing at all!♪ I'm totally fine!♪
笑顔で誤魔化すホノカだが、<br>その背後――お尻の部分に、小さなシミができてい:
Honoka covered it up with a smile, but behind her—on her bottom—a
small stain had formed.
どうやら先ほどマーキングと称して、<br>たっぷりと注ぎ込んだ精液が溢れ出してき:
Apparently, the semen pumped into her so much earlier under the
guise of 'marking' was starting to leak out.
ホノカを囲む人々の中には男の姿もあったが、今回は嫉妬を抱くことなく、<br>むし:
There were men surrounding Honoka, but this time they felt no
jealousy—only satisfaction and forbidden excitement.
